name: LookupMeasuredMethod
title: LookupMeasuredMethod
description: Searches for the specified measured method. The path must be complete including namespaces and both endpoints: (Namespace::)+Service.measure[consumer,provider].Method.
You can downcast the result to a concrete type, see the example.
return: The measured method. An uninitialized object if the method is not found, which will also be reported in the Write Window or as an error in test system (if the function is called in a test routine).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
